command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute 
UPDATE tutorRosterOverride
   SET note = 'Summer schooling — lighter pace. Mom + Grandma teaching. Fewer blocks per day, more adventures / read-aloud / choice / outdoor. Indian Hill 2025–26 ended Thu May 21; Reagan continues homeschool through summer at a lower intensity. No tutors.'
 WHERE week_start_date = '2026-05-25';

SELECT id, week_start_date, active_tutor_names_json, helper_names_json, note
FROM tutorRosterOverride
WHERE week_start_date = '2026-05-25';

rows.note: Summer schooling — lighter pace. Mom + Grandma teaching. Fewer blocks per day, more adventures / read-aloud / choice / outdoor. Indian Hill 2025–26 ended Thu May 21; Reagan continues homeschool through summer at a lower intensity. No tutors.
